title: SEC3: clone-Rc-before-await pattern duplicated across API methods
description: api.rs: The pattern of cloning the inner Rc out of the RefCell before entering an async block, with an early-return not-connected error, is repeated verbatim in `send_message` (lines 177-182) and `set_nickname` (lines 198-203), and would be repeated for every future method (`send_whisper`, `publish_key_package`, etc.). Extract a private helper `fn get_client(&self) -> Result<Rc<NieRelayClient>, JsValue>` that performs the borrow, clone, and not-connected check in one place. Each async API method then calls `let client = self.get_client()?` before the `future_to_promise` block.
